name: daily-task-generator
description: Daily Task Generator - Plataforma Completa de Gerenciamento de Tarefas e Produtividade com Scrum, Kanban, Chat em Tempo Real e Autenticação

scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.test: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint

author: Daily Task Generator Team
